---
name: Enhancement
about: Propose a feature or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What gap or pain point does this address?

## Proposed change

What you want to build or change. If it adds an IM, agent, or model adapter,
note how it plugs into the existing registries.

## Scope and acceptance

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Privacy / boundary impact

Does this change what data can leave the machine, or what the model can reach?
If so, describe the new enforcement points.

## Out of scope

What this issue deliberately does not cover.
